state_manifold.embedding_function: BFS enumeration in PSL2(Z/NZ) from generators S,T
constraints: Elements are represented as 4-tuples (a,b,c,d) with entries in {0..N-1}
PSL normalization identifies M ~ -M by choosing lexicographically minimal of (a,b,c,d) and (-a,-b,-c,-d) mod N
Group operation is matrix multiplication mod N with PSL normalization
Conjugation action is x ↦ g x g^{-1}

invariants.name: well_defined_on_psl
invariants.definition: Label depends only on PSL class (M ~ -M); enforced by PSL normalization and/or explicit check.

invariants.name: class_function
invariants.definition: Label is a class function on PSL2(Z/NZ): for all g,x, label(g x g^{-1}) = label(x).

failure_taxonomy.trigger_condition: schema_id mismatch or missing required fields
BFS enumeration fails to generate claimed group size or hits inconsistent transitions
Found g,x with label(g x g^{-1}) != label(x)
Found x with label(x) != label(-x) (should not occur for PSL-normalized label)

determinism_contract.nondeterminism_proof: BFS uses a fixed generator order (S, T, T^{-1}) and deterministic PSL normalization. Label evaluation is pure and deterministic.
